---
title: "Data Science Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
<<<<<<< HEAD
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
=======
  sort-ui: true
<<<<<<< HEAD
  filter-ui: true
=======
  filter-ui: false
>>>>>>> 904da2108bedb64f12044de8243456c8893dac57
>>>>>>> 44cf567f5e48f0d9e9f11658d72ea5aba2ec4f3e
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
